text: The Cre-loxP recombination technique was employed to produce Prdx1 conditional knockout (Prdx1-cKO) mice specifically in acinar cells. These mice were maintained on a C57BL/6 genetic background. Prdx1 floxed mice (Prdx1flox/flox) were purchased from Cyagen Biosciences (China), and Prdx1-cKO mice were generated by crossing them with Ptf1a-Cre transgenic mice (Shanghai Model Organisms Center, China). Littermate Prdx1flox/flox mice served as wild-type controls for comparison with homozygous Prdx1-cKO mice. Genomic DNA isolated from tail samples was used for genotyping the mice using PCR-based methods. The primers used were as follows: forward, CCAGCTTCATGAGTAGGTAGGATT; reverse, CCAGCTTCATGAGTAGGTAGGATT. All mice were housed in standard cages at 22–28°C with 40–60% humidity, and had free access to food and water.
